hooks.command: cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" && old=$(git rev-parse HEAD) && { git pull --rebase --autostash >/dev/null 2>&1 || git rebase --abort >/dev/null 2>&1; }; new=$(git rev-parse HEAD); git fetch --prune >/dev/null 2>&1; drafts=$(git branch -r --no-merged origin/main 2>/dev/null | grep -o 'origin/claude/[^ ]*' | sed 's|origin/||' | paste -sd ',' - | sed 's/,/, /g'); msg=''; if [ "$old" != "$new" ]; then msg='Synced latest Unison changes from GitHub'; fi; if [ -n "$drafts" ]; then if [ -n "$msg" ]; then msg="$msg. "; fi; msg="${msg}Phone drafts waiting to be merged: $drafts"; printf '{"systemMessage":"%s","hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"Unmerged claude/* branches from Morgan's phone sessions are waiting on GitHub: %s. Review the diff of each against main, then merge into main and delete the remote branch, explaining in plain language. Do this before other work unless Morgan says otherwise."}}' "$msg" "$drafts"; elif [ -n "$msg" ]; then printf '{"systemMessage":"%s"}' "$msg"; fi; true
hooks.statusMessage: Syncing latest Unison changes from GitHub

hooks.command: cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" && n=$(git rev-list --count '@{u}..HEAD' 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$n" -gt 0 ]; then git push >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"Auto-pushed $n commit(s) to GitHub\"}"; fi; true
